headline: Air Products to Showcase Industrial Decarbonization Solutions at the Canadian Hydrogen Convention in Edmonton, Alberta
summary: Air Products (NYSE:APD) will highlight how its innovative hydrogen technologies and expertise can help heavy industry and heavy-duty transportation improve efficiency and reach decarbonization goals at the Canadian Hydrogen Convention on April 21-22, at the Edmonton Convention Centre, in Edmonton, Alberta, Canada.
